bug: Missing guard for (area!=0 && !interior) case. Original truth table: (0,F)=SET, (0,T)=RET, (!=0,T)=SET, (!=0,F)=RET. Reversed only guards (!area && interior). Fix: if(!!ms_nRequiredCollisionArea != m_bInterior) return;
Line 456 divides dot² by pMagSq instead of lMagSq. Formula should be |p|² - (p·l)²/|l|², reversed computes |p|² - (p·l)²/|p|². Wrong denominator.
Line 1244 misplaced parenthesis: std::abs((expr >= threshold)) applies abs to boolean instead of float. Original: fabs(componentSum) >= thickness.
depth computed with unclamped touchDist in original; reversed clamps to 0 first (line ~1516), giving smaller depth when spheres significantly overlap (dist < spB.radius).
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original has real implementation finding closest of 3 points to a given point.
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original calls ClosestPointOnLine 3 times for each triangle edge.
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original calls ClosestPointOnLine 3 times then Closest3.
NOTSA_UNREACHABLE where original has real implementation.
Two issues: (1) strcmp/strncmp used but original uses _stricmp/_strnicmp (case-insensitive). (2) m_nModelIdStart initialized to -1 but original uses 0x7FFF (SHRT_MAX).
Line 399: AddSplashParticles call passes vecAllPoints[i][2] and vecAllPoints[i+1][2] but original passes vecAllPoints[2][i] and vecAllPoints[2][i+1]. Array indices swapped.

Two issues: (1) Original handles EVENT_POTENTIAL_WALK_INTO_BUILDING (type 0x3c) with building+dotProduct check; reversed replaces with assert. (2) Reversed adds incorrect dotProduct <= -0.5f guard before TASK_COMPLEX_CLIMB check; original has no such guard.
Uses IsSubBike() (checks m_nVehicleSubType) instead of IsBike() (checks m_nVehicleType at offset 0x594). Wrong type check.
WEAPON_MOLOTOV case: original checks both bExplosionProof AND bFireProof; reversed only checks bFireProof. Missing bExplosionProof check.
speedSoFar += abs(abs(...)) always increases. Original conditionally adds/subtracts based on sign of (fullSpeedStep - speedSoFar). Camera buffering breaks when speed needs to decrease.
Missing m_nCurrentTweakModelIndex = camTweak.ModelID after match (asm: mov [ecx+0xd54], edx). Early-return guard never succeeds, InitCameraVehicleTweaks runs every frame.
Phase4 #59: vertAngle - atan(...) should be vertAngle + atan(...). Original: fadd then fchs = -(atan+vert). Reversed has minus, flipping atan sign ~12° error.
When m_fFadeDuration==0: uses += instead of = for alpha. FADE_OUT adds 0.0 (no-op), FADE_IN adds 255.0 (accumulates). Should be assignment.
FADE_IN case checks m_nMusicFadingDirection but original checks m_nFadeInOutFlag (offset 0xC30 vs 0xC3A). Wrong variable in switch.
Missing 3 unconditional assignments: m_bCameraJustRestored=true, m_bEnable1rstPersonCamCntrlsScript=false, m_bAllow1rstPersonWeaponsCamera=false.
Uses GetHeading()=atan2(-fwd.x,fwd.y) but original calls GetATanOfXY(fwd.x,fwd.y). Negated x argument.
m_nMinZoom and m_nMaxZoom swapped. ASM stores maxZoom param to m_nMinZoom field and vice versa.
Copies entire CCam struct into active cam via auto& instead of using separate reference to other cam.
Missing call to CMBlur::MotionBlurOpen(camera) after m_mViewMatrix.Attach.
Default case sets zoom=0.25f; original only sets flag without changing zoom for unknown modes.
Checks GetStatus()==STATUS_SIMPLE but original checks GetType()==ENTITY_TYPE_VEHICLE.
Uses PEDSTATE_ARRESTED(74) but original uses 0x3f=63 (PEDSTATE_TAXI_PASSENGER).
Default calls SetCamCollisionVarDataSet(0); original returns early without updating.
Stores targetPed into m_pExtraEntity but original stores taskHold->m_pEntityToHold (held entity).
notsa::contains checks all 2 array slots; original only checks first m_nExtraEntitiesCount entries.
Uses Magnitude() (sqrt) but original compares squared magnitude against 1e-6.
m_fMaxRoleAngle=DegreesToRadians(20.0f) but original stores DegreesToRadians(2.0f). 10x too large.
Uses TransformPoint but original calls TransformVector (no translation component).
std::max should be std::min for upper alpha clamp; uses 85deg instead of ~89.5deg.
ClipBeta always adds/subtracts 360deg instead of conditional 3-way clamp.
m_vecUp.y set to m_vecSource.y but should be cos(0.4f).
Wrong component multiplication for right/up vectors in aim calculation.
Uses CrossProduct where original uses vector addition/subtraction.
Missing m_vecSource.x assignment after ConeCastCollisionResolve. Only .y and .z written.
Missing rwRENDERSTATEZTESTENABLE=FALSE before texture/blend state setup.

CColAccelIPLEntry struct has m_nLodIndex (offset 0x00) and m_nEntityIndex (offset 0x04) swapped vs original. Disasm confirms original stores entityIndex at 0x00 and lodIndex at 0x04. Self-consistent in reversed code but cacheIPLSection applies m_bUnderwater to entity instead of LOD entity. Fix: swap field order in ColAccel.h.
Reversed calls SetCustomCarPlateText(text) but original passes nullptr (push 0 at 0x6D1119). Should clear plate text after creating texture.
Missing ApplyTurnForceToOccupantOnEntry(passenger) call. Original applies turn force in both overloads; reversed only in Auto-Seat (0x6D13A0).
When bIgnoreSpeedUpright=true, returns SquaredMagnitude() > 0.0004F but original returns true when <= 0.0004F. Comparison inverted. Confirmed: jne at 0x6D1FCE.
m_nAlarmState = ts should be m_nAlarmState -= ts. Confirmed: sub esi,eax at 0x6D2244. Alarm never counts down.
Missing null check before RegisterReference(m_pWhoDetonatedMe). Original checks m_pWhoInstalledBombOnMe != 0 first.
Missing switch case FLIGHT_MODEL_RC (2). Original routes both BARON (1) and RC (2) to same branch.
Wrong constant in z<=0 branch: uses 0.5F but original uses 0.0F (at 0x859060).
When curr >= 255 and !bFadeOut: returns 255 but original leaves value unchanged.
Uses m_nPieceTypeB (offset 0x24) but original uses m_nSurfaceTypeB (offset 0x23) for IsSand/CreatesWheelSpray. Confirmed: byte [esi+0x23] at 0x6D2D60.
Case 17 (stereo): checks RadioType != AE_RT_CIVILIAN but original checks == AE_RT_CIVILIAN. Condition inverted.
Passes &upgradeId (pointer) to RpClumpForAllAtomics but original passes upgradeId value directly. Callback compares as integer.
Shared helper sets ATOMIC_ALPHA flag but original 0x6D3700 does NOT set it. Flag only in CreateUpgradeAtomic.
Passes &frameOfUpgrade to RemoveObjectsCB but original passes pointer-to-zero.
Calls GetRope(GetRopeID()) but original calls FindRope first to convert ID to index. Should be GetRope(FindRope(GetRopeID())). Same bug in 0x6D3CF0, 0x6D3D10, 0x6D3D30.
Same FindRope bug as 0x6D3CB0. Also reversed is one-line stub but original has ~60 lines of inline logic.
RUSTLER gun offset applied inside IsZero guard only. Original applies it outside, so offset added to both dummy and hardcoded positions.
For double guns, original negates X of planeGunPosMS for second gun (mirrored). Reversed fires both from same position.
Original negates X of ordnance position for second missile. Reversed fires both from same position.
Engine braking checks brake > 500.0f but original checks m_pHandlingData->m_fMass < 500.0f. Wrong variable.
Non-bike !isRight branch: FRONT_LEFT/REAR_LEFT return values swapped vs original.
Checks IsTypePed() but original checks NOT ped. Rotor damage fires for wrong entity type.
(1) baseVel uses GetRight().y/.z but original uses GetForward() for all. Copy-paste. (2) size = v12+0.75f*0.1f should be (v12+0.75f)*0.1f.
vecParticleVelocity z set to moveSpeed.z*30 or Forward.z but original always z=0.
Else branch: reversed has extra "if (right)" guard before DoHeadLightReflectionSingle(matrix, true). Original calls unconditionally.
Range-for over {m_pOverheatParticle, m_pFireParticle, m_pDustParticle} iterates copies. particle=nullptr is no-op. Original sets each member to 0 after DestroyFxSystem.
Inverted return: returns FindActiveTaskFromList (truthy when task found) but original returns true when neither task found.
m_nMoneyCount > 10 should be > 9 (>= 10). Off-by-one.
(1) Ammo uses * 2 but original does >> 1 (divide by 2), 4x intended. (2) Missing ClearWeapons() at end.
RadiansToDegrees(45.0f) should be DegreesToRadians(45.0f). Adds ~2578 instead of pi/4.
Returns false for PED_UNKNOWN(0) instead of PED_GAME_MISSION(3). Wrong enum value.
std::max should be std::min. Clip ammo clamped up instead of down to total.
std::min(1000.f) should be std::min(1.0f). Stat/1000 not clamped properly.
Missing m_nModelIndex = -1 (0xFFFF) before SetModelIndex. Original sets to -1 so SetModelIndex detects change.
Reads m_pEntityToHold AFTER DropEntity() which nulls it via ClearReference. Original saves pointer before. Entity never deleted.
Missing FixRadianAngle on m_fCurrentRotation before delta. Original normalizes both angles.
Loop step 3.5f should be 0.5f; inner x not reset; direction inverted. Grid completely wrong.
Missing +1.0f z offset on LOS source position.
Player/non-player look-restore times swapped (2000/4000 inverted).
Uses assert instead of RemoveGogglesModel() when goggles exist. Leaks in release.
PRO threshold >= should be > (strictly greater).
Adjusts m_fCurrentRotation by PI but should adjust m_fLookDirection by TWO_PI. Wrong variable and constant.
Uses GetLodSectorX/Y (200m, max 29) but original uses GetSectorX/Y (50m, max 119).
Return type void but original returns CObject*. DropEntity called conditionally instead of unconditionally.
Sets m_nPedState BEFORE ReleaseCoverPoint/ClearBlip. Original sets AFTER. Side-effects see wrong state.
RNG call order: checks 3% first, skipping money rand() on hit. Desyncs global RNG.
Missing fallthrough: SMG slot no match + !jetpack should fall to RemoveWeaponModel.
Wobble: checks IsPlayer() but original checks !IsPlayer(). Inverted.
DIE case ApplyMoveForce Z missing +4.0f.
bHasACamera inverted: true when rand()%4!=0 (75%) but original when ==0 (25%).
Missing m_fLookDirection=heading assignment.
(1) IsPointWithin omits bounding radius expansion. (2) outCount only incremented when outEntities non-null; original always increments.
dist <= radius should be dist < outNearestDist. Wrong variable (fixed input vs running minimum) and wrong operator (<= vs <).
SetCurrentScanCode after collision/ignore checks instead of immediately after IsScanCodeCurrent. Filtered entities unmarked, causing redundant reprocessing.
Uses non-virtual CEntity::SetModelIndexNoCreate and CEntity::CreateRwObject. Original vtable-dispatches. Derived overrides lost.
Missing negation on wind direction x,y. Original: -(WindDir+0.01). Reversed: positive.
Sets m_bStreamingDontDelete (bit 10) but original sets m_bDontCastShadowsOn (bit 16). Wrong flag.
RpGeometrySetFlags replaces all flags with 0x40. Should OR with existing.
rpATOMIC case missing geometry flags |= rpGEOMETRYMODULATEMATERIALCOLOR.
Missing m_pMovingList null check before AddToMovingList.
CRect uninitialized. Original inits to {1e6,-1e6,-1e6,1e6}.
Multiplies by CWeather::Wind (continuous) but original uses discretized threshold (0.2/0.43/0.66).
(1) Sun glare corona ID wrong. (2) FLASH_RANDOM divides by 4096 not 2048. (3) FLASH_5ON_5OFF mode always 0 due to integer division order.
Returns after first match. Original removes ALL matching escalators.
bInVehicle condition inverted. Original checks !bInVehicle. Player hidden when NOT in vehicle.
(1) Say CTX 0x94 should be 0x96. (2) RemoveAllFollowers conditional but original unconditional.
& should be | for animation flags. PLAYING & FINISH_AUTO_REMOVE = 0 (no-op). Same bug at 0x60D000.
(1) Infinite loop: GetSize() as condition, not i < GetSize(). (2) closestDist init max() vs 99999.9f.
RadiansToDegrees(30/150/210/330) should be DegreesToRadians. All four angle comparisons ~1719 instead of ~0.524 rad.
Shadow ID: entity->GetLod()+localId+3 dereferences m_pLod. Original: (uint32)entity+0x33+localId (pointer arithmetic). Null LOD causes collisions.
Water shadow: vtxIt never incremented between 4 ProcessOneVertex calls. All 4 vertices overwrite same buffer slot.
Up.z >= 0.f should be > 0.f. At exactly 0 side vector sign wrong.
std::max(frontX, -sideX) should be std::max(frontX, -sideY). Wrong variable negated.

Non-coop path missing if(unk) guard around vehicle/timer block. Original: when unk=false, jumps directly to cleanup (je 0x56EB44). Reversed runs vehicle altitude check and timer update unconditionally, may incorrectly set m_nRequireParachuteTimer=5000 and request parachute model.
m_nObjectFlags &= 0xFC040000 missing |= 0x40000 to force bCanBeAttachedToMagnet=true. Original: and eax,0xfc040000; or eax,0x40000. Reversed only ANDs, leaving bit 18 unchanged if previously clear.
DUMPER/FORKLIFT carry check: original only requires m_wMiscComponentAngle!=0 for FORKLIFT (0x212). For DUMPER (0x196) it jumps past the angle check (je 0x5A21ED). Reversed requires angle for both.

FX system creation uses TransformPoint(offset)+GetPosition(), double-adding position. Original calls Multiply3x3 (0x59c790, rotation only) then adds position once. Particle spawns at 2x object position from origin.
Same TransformPoint+GetPosition double-add bug as Explode. Original calls Multiply3x3 at 0x5A11D0 then adds position. FX offset doubled.

vecRopePoint *= TransformPoint(vecRopePoint) uses multiply-assign instead of assignment. Since vecRopePoint={0,0,height}, *= zeroes x and y components. Should be vecRopePoint = TransformPoint(vecRopePoint).

Pool iteration direction: reversed iterates forward (oldest objects first), original iterates backward from pool size (newest first). Changes which temp objects are freed when numObjects < total temporaries.

DUMPER: colAngleMult = DUMPER_COL_ANGLEMULT set unconditionally after carNodeMisc assignment. Original only sets it inside if(node != null). With null node and non-zero colAngleMult, produces wrong collision speed.
Extra m_fAircraftGoToHeading -= TWO_PI after normalization loop at line 3893. No corresponding instruction in original (fstp at 0x6A2443 stores directly after loop). Heading off by TWO_PI radians.
Sets m_fForcedOrientation = 0.0f but original stores -1.0f (mov dword [ecx+0x954], 0xBF800000). -1.0 is the "no orientation" sentinel.

(1) Checks m_bWheelFNarrow2 (m_nHandlingFlags offset 0xD0 bit 8) but original checks m_bNoDoors (m_nModelFlags offset 0xCC bit 8). Wrong flag determines if doors set to NOTPRESENT. (2) Panel loop iterates 3 (m_panels) but original iterates 4, including m_swingingChassis as 4th bouncing panel.
Panel loop iterates 3 (m_panels) but original iterates 4 (same as Fix bug). Missing reset of m_swingingChassis treated as 4th bouncing panel.

(1) m_nGettingInFlags & flagMask condition inverted in all 3 checks — original proceeds when flag is 0 (no ped getting in). (2) Writes 0 to m_nBusDoorTimerStart instead of CTimer::GetTimeInMS() to m_nBusDoorTimerEnd. (3) Missing animated open ratio for right front door close.

Switch logic wrong: DAMSTATE_OK missing intermediate SetDoorStatus(BOOT,OPENED) call before fallthrough to OPENED_DAMAGED. DAMSTATE_DAMAGED returns immediately instead of calling SetDoorStatus(BOOT,OPENED_DAMAGED) and setting angVel=-2.0f.

Sets m_fWheelsSuspensionCompression=1.0f but original uses 0.99999f (0x3F7FFF58). 1.0 means "wheel has no contact" throughout codebase (checks use < 1.0), so hover wheels lose contact force on water surface.

(1) BBox min Z update commented out as self-assignment; original writes colLine[0].end.z to boundBox.min.z (different memory). (2) Bounding sphere radius update (std::max of magnitude) inside if-block; original computes unconditionally.
(1) Inverted speed condition: spawns debris when speedSq<=0.0625 (slow), skips when fast. Original spawns when speedSq>0.0625. (2) FxPrtMult last param 1.0f should be 0.1f (0x3DCCCCCD at 0x6A6E93).

(1) Checks this->m_nModelIndex for GRASSHOUSE/GRASSPLANT instead of object->m_nModelIndex. Always compares harvester model, never matches. (2) Turn speed range GetRandomNumberInRange(0.12,-0.04) should be (-0.04,0.04). Original: rand*0.08-0.04.
sin(angle + 0.1f) should be sin(angle) + 0.1f. Original: fld angle; fsin; fadd 0.1. Adds 0.1 to result not argument.

Swapped lerp coefficients for m_f2ndSteerAngle when handbrake on. Reversed: lerp(old, -new, 0.9) = 0.1*old - 0.9*new. Original at 0x6ADD39: 0.9*old - 0.1*new. Rear wheel steer dramatically overshoots.
Inverted bTankExplodesCars condition. Original: proceeds when flag set (je skips when NOT set). Reversed: returns when flag set. Tank/Rhino never blows up cars in path.
DOOR_BOOT case checks m_bAltSteerOpt (m_nHandlingFlags bit 7, offset 0xD0) but original checks m_bNoswingBoot (m_nModelFlags bit 7, offset 0xCC). Wrong flag determines boot swing behavior.
BlowUpCar_Impl always passes false to FuckCarCompletely. Original BlowUpCarCutSceneNoExtras passes bNoExplosion param. Cutscene explosions don't fully damage vehicle.
Missing abs() on distance.x and distance.y before < 10.0f comparison. Original negates negative distances. Negative-side vehicles never detected.
(1) break exits inner loop instead of return true on hit. (2) Returns true unconditionally; original returns false (xor ax,ax) when no hit. Function always reports hit.

Double rear wheel exclusion compares hierarchy ID against CAR_WHEEL_LF=0 but original compares against 5 (wheel_lf_dummy). ID 0 is headlights, never matches. Left front wheel incorrectly gets double wheel on vehicles with m_bDoubleRwheels.
Uses strcmp (case-sensitive) but original uses _stricmp (case-insensitive) to compare against "null". "Null", "NULL" etc. won't match in reversed code.

ms_upgradeWheels array dimensions transposed: declared int16[15][4] (stride 4) but original uses stride 15 (imul edx,edx,0xf). Should be int16[4][15]. Affects AddWheelUpgrade, GetWheelUpgrade, and GetNumWheelUpgrades indexing.
SPEEDER water-occlusion vertices 2,3: Y-coord is -0.06F but original uses +0.06F (0x3D75C28F). Sign error on Y position.
DPadLeft condition inverted — returns when pressed instead of proceeding. Also missing check on CPad field at offset 0x44.
Unconditionally sets m_NumWakeCoords=count after loop. Original only sets it when break was triggered (dead wake point found). When all 32 points alive, original leaves m_NumWakeCoords unchanged.
(1) Decrements iVal (nWakeSkipCounterVertex) instead of nWakeSkipCounters[ind]. Wrong variable. (2) Missing else clause: when iVal > nWakeSkipCounters[ind]-1, should set nWakeSkipCounters[ind]=iVal.
Reads m_nNoOfContactWheels (offset 0x804) but original reads m_NumDriveWheelsOnGround (offset 0x805). Wrong field — off by one byte.
Ped collision loop reads from zero-initialized pedCPs[] instead of collision result pedEntityColPts[]. All ped collision points silently dropped — pedCPs never written to.
m_aRatioHistory[i] initialized to 0.0f but original stores 1.0f (0x3F800000). Suspension ratio history starts wrong.

Range-for iterates by value (auto node), so node=nullptr doesn't null the array entry. Also uses delete instead of free — original frees malloc'd track nodes with free(). Fix: use auto& node and free().

(1) trainFlags modified on this instead of iterated carriage in 4 loops: station stop (line 529-530), door close (518-519), departure (508), and derail (665). Only this gets flags, subsequent carriages skipped. (2) Buoyancy section reuses vecOldTrainPosition after ProcessBuoyancy overwrites it with force output. Speed factor and ApplyMoveForce use old position instead of buoyancy force.
Range-for iterates all 4 HeliSearchLights entries but original loops only up to NumberOfSearchLights. Renders stale/uninitialized searchlight data beyond active count.

(1) avgWheelY = fabs(a) + fabs(b) should be fabs(a + b). Original: fabs of sum, not sum of fabs. (2) Final m_wheelPosition loop iterates NUM_TRAILER_SUPPORTS(2) but original iterates 4 (mov ecx,4). Missing 2 wheel position inits.
Checks STATUS_REMOTE_CONTROLLED(8) but original checks STATUS_IS_TOWED(10) (cmp cl,0xa). Wrong enum value.
std::clamp(ratio, 0.0f, -1000.0f) has inverted bounds (UB). Original: if(ratio > -1000.0f) ratio = 0.0f. Simple conditional, not a clamp.
Support lines processing loop nested inside wheel loop (runs 4x). Original has it as separate sequential loop after wheel loop.
Uses SquaredMagnitude() (no sqrt) but original has fsqrt at 0x420B46. atan2(right.z, mag²) gives wrong roll angle. Should use Magnitude().

Initial pedType set to PED_TYPE_MISSION8(31) but original uses 0x20(32=PED_TYPE_COUNT). mov ebp,0x20 at function start. Wrong sentinel — corrupts PED_TYPE_MISSION8 entry if acquaintance line precedes first ped type name.

Inverted null check: reversed returns early when no current event (!oe), but original returns early only when event IS present AND type==EVENT_LEADER_ENTRY_EXIT. Skips all follower teleportation when no event.
pOutDistSq write guarded by if(closest) but original writes unconditionally when pointer non-null (writes initial 1.0e8 if no member found). Also uses FLT_MAX vs original 1.0e8 as initial distance.
ppOutNearestMember written only for nearest member. Original writes it for every non-null follower — final value is last member in array, not nearest. Original game bug but reversed changed behavior.
stricmp "parachute" only checked on first partial animation association. While loop iterates remaining associations without re-checking name. Original checks every association in chain.

Missing early return-false path. Original has two independent checks: (1) event handler source==attacker AND hate/dislike → return false, (2) group event source==attacker AND hate/dislike → return false. Reversed nests them, requiring both conditions.
Loop variable i not used in GetTaskPrimary call. Always checks TASK_PRIMARY_PHYSICAL_RESPONSE (slot 1) instead of slots 1,2,3. Should be GetTaskPrimary(i).
